title: Build a User schema with required fields
prompt: Build an Ecto schema `MyApp.Accounts.User` with a string email (required), string name (required), and a password_hash. The changeset/2 function should cast these fields and mark email and name as required. Use UTC timestamps. Write to lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex.
tier_rationale: Well-known single-schema construction. Easy tier because it tests baseline competence without any trick questions.
